description: Synthetic expected claims for placeholder fixtures.

claims.claim_text: The synthetic user prefers concise weekly planning notes with blockers, decisions, and next actions.
match_aliases: weekly planning notes should list blockers, decisions, and next actions

claims.claim_text: The synthetic user prefers recipe drafts with extra lemon and less sugar.
match_aliases: prefers extra lemon and less sugar in recipes

claims.claim_text: The synthetic user wants the recipe glaze to be tart rather than candy-sweet.
match_aliases: does not want a candy-sweet glaze

claims.claim_text: The synthetic project checklist says to finish local-only benchmark review before changing production segmentation.
match_aliases: finish local-only benchmark review before production segmentation changes

claims.claim_text: The synthetic benchmark debugging thread requires updating MetricBundle serialization and report rendering before changing tests.
match_aliases: update MetricBundle serialization and report rendering before tests

claims.claim_text: The synthetic user prefers aisle seats on long flights.
match_aliases: choose an aisle seat on long flights

claims.claim_text: The synthetic user prefers errand summaries to put deadlines before locations.
match_aliases: deadlines before locations in errand summaries

claims.claim_text: The synthetic whiteboard summary has three columns: Risks, Owners, and Dates.
match_aliases: whiteboard columns are risks owners and dates

claims.claim_text: The synthetic context-guard preference is to fail closed before context shift rather than silently truncate.
match_aliases: fail closed before context shift instead of silently truncating
